channel.title: Error When Running npx frontify create
channel.description:
Hello.
I thought I'd try out Frontify to build a new theme for one of my projects.
However, when I try to run the install command `npx frontify create fishoutdolanout` I get the following error:
`Error: EPERM: operation not permitted, mkdir 'C:\Users\James' command not found: frontify`
Am running it in my themes folder.
Thanks James

item.title: Error When Running npx frontify create
item.dc:creator: kasper
item.source: Error When Running npx frontify create

item.title: Error When Running npx frontify create
item.dc:creator: fishoutdolanout
item.description:
Hello.

I thought I’d try out Frontify to build a new theme for one of my projects.

However, when I try to run the install command npx frontify create fishoutdolanout I get the following error:

Error: EPERM: operation not permitted, mkdir 'C:\Users\James' command not found: frontify

Am running it in my themes folder.

Thanks
James

Read full topic
item.source: Error When Running npx frontify create
